phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra la Cinque Terre Card, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-veh see KOM-pra la CHEEN-kweh TER-reh card, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In tutte le biglietterie della stazione.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN TOOT-teh LEH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-eh DEHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh

responses.phonetic: EEN TOOT-teh LEH beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-eh DEHL-lah stah-tsee-OH-neh
responses.french: In tutte le biglietterie della stazione.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto dura la validità del biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh DOO-ra la va-lee-dee-TAH del bee-LYET-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa la card giornaliera, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta la card jor-na-LYEH-ra, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si attiva la card sui tornelli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KO-meh see AT-tee-va la card sooy tor-NEL-lee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Appoggiarla sul lettore verde fino al bip.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahp-pohj-jee-AHR-lah SOOL leht-TOH-reh VEHR-deh FEE-noh AHL BEEP
likely_response.translation_en: Rest it on the green reader until the beep.

responses.english: Rest it on the green reader until the beep.
responses.phonetic: ahp-pohj-jee-AHR-lah SOOL leht-TOH-reh VEHR-deh FEE-noh AHL BEEP
responses.french: Appoggiarla sul lettore verde fino al bip.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono ancora card disponibili oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh an-KOH-ra card dee-spo-NEE-bee-lee OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh
